evidence.A_value: a 1d water column hydrodynamic model simulating vertical mixing, turbulence, hydrodynamics, providing physical driver fields for coupled biogeochemical models via fabm, receiving ecological feedback variables e.g., light attenuation, heat flux from f
evidence.B_value: a process-based biogeochemical lake ecosystem model simulating nutrient cycling, primary production, oxygen dynamics, sediment-water interactions, implemented within the framework for aquatic biogeochemical models fabm for coupling with host hydrodyn
